requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — EN IEC 62133-2
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——EN IEC 62133-2
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——EN IEC 62133-2

summary.en: Portable lithium cells and battery packs placed on the EU market must meet the mandatory safety and conformity obligations in the applicable EU legislation, including the Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU and Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 where in scope. EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021 is a voluntary harmonised-standard route that may give presumption of conformity for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries when correctly applied; alternative technical solutions are allowed if the manufacturer demonstrates the legal safety requirements. The standard covers abuse testing (overcharge, short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge) and electrochemical performance limits, and is commonly used to support the CE technical file.
summary.zh: 投放欧盟市场的便携式锂电芯及电池组，须满足适用欧盟法律中的强制安全和合格评定义务，包括低压指令2014/35/EU及适用范围内的法规（EU）2023/1542。EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021是自愿采用的协调标准路径，正确适用时可为便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池提供符合性推定；如制造商能够证明满足法定安全要求，也可采用替代技术方案。该标准涵盖滥用测试（过充、短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学性能限值，通常用于支持CE技术文件。
summary.zht: 投放歐盟市場的便攜式鋰電芯及電池組，須滿足適用歐盟法律中的強制安全和合格評定義務，包括低壓指令2014/35/EU及適用範圍內的法規（EU）2023/1542。EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021是自願採用的協調標準路徑，正確適用時可為便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池提供符合性推定；如製造商能夠證明滿足法定安全要求，也可採用替代技術方案。該標準涵蓋濫用測試（過充、短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學性能限值，通常用於支持CE技術文件。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable applications — Part 2: Lithium systems

summary.en: China's primary safety standards for portable lithium battery packs are GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment — revised edition) and GB 18287-2013 (General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones, under revision). GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133-2 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. Testing by a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory to GB 31241 is NOT recognised by EU Notified Bodies or under the EU LVD/Battery Regulation conformity assessment pathway.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求，修订版）和GB 18287-2013（手机用锂离子电池总规范，修订中）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133-2，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。中国CNAS认可实验室依据GB 31241出具的检测报告，在欧盟LVD/电池法规合格评定路径下不被公告机构认可。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求，修訂版）和GB 18287-2013（手機用鋰離子電池總規範，修訂中）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133-2，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。中國CNAS認可實驗室依據GB 31241出具的檢測報告，在歐盟LVD/電池法規合格評定路徑下不被公告機構認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287-2013 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC)

gap.en: Exporters should build evidence for the LVD and Battery Regulation safety obligations. EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021 testing from an appropriately accredited laboratory is the common voluntary harmonised-standard route to presumption of conformity, but it is not the only legally accepted route. Existing GB 31241 reports may support engineering analysis but do not automatically establish EU conformity. Key gaps: (1) test severity differences in crush and overcharge tests; (2) EU requires an EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC), CE marking, and technical file; (3) Battery Regulation 2023/1542 adds labelling requirements (battery chemistry, capacity, QR code) that have no equivalent in Chinese domestic requirements for export.
gap.zh: 出口商应围绕LVD及电池法规下的安全义务建立证据。由具备相应资质实验室出具的EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021测试，是常见的自愿协调标准路径，可用于获得符合性推定，但并非法律上唯一可接受路径。现有GB 31241报告可支持工程分析，但不会自动证明欧盟符合性。主要差距：（1）挤压和过充测试的严苛程度存在差异；（2）欧盟要求提供欧盟符合性声明（DoC）、CE标志及技术文件；（3）电池法规2023/1542增加了标签要求（电池化学体系、容量、QR码），在中国国内出口要求中无对应规定。
gap.zht: 出口商應圍繞LVD及電池法規下的安全義務建立證據。由具備相應資質實驗室出具的EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021測試，是常見的自願協調標準路徑，可用於獲得符合性推定，但並非法律上唯一可接受路徑。現有GB 31241報告可支持工程分析，但不會自動證明歐盟符合性。主要差距：（1）擠壓和過充測試的嚴苛程度存在差異；（2）歐盟要求提供歐盟符合性聲明（DoC）、CE標誌及技術文件；（3）電池法規2023/1542增加了標籤要求（電池化學體系、容量、QR碼），在中國國內出口要求中無對應規定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation — LVD 2014/35/EU and Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 safety/conformity duties apply before EU market placement; EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021 is voluntary and may give presumption of conformity when correctly applied
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EU market placement requires compliance with LVD 2014/35/EU and Regulation (EU) 2023/1542 where applicable, supported by CE marking and a technical file. EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021 is a voluntary harmonised standard that can provide presumption of conformity; alternatives are allowed if the legal safety requirements are demonstrated. Chinese GB 31241 certification does not by itself satisfy the EU conformity assessment file, so exporters should prepare EU-facing evidence and testing for the chosen route.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】进入欧盟市场须符合LVD 2014/35/EU及适用时的法规（EU）2023/1542，并以CE标志和技术文件支持。EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021是可提供符合性推定的自愿协调标准；如能证明满足法定安全要求，也可采用替代路径。中国GB 31241认证本身不能满足欧盟合格评定文件要求，因此出口商应针对所选择路径准备面向欧盟的证据和测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】進入歐盟市場須符合LVD 2014/35/EU及適用時的法規（EU）2023/1542，並以CE標誌和技術文件支持。EN IEC 62133-2:2017+A1:2021是可提供符合性推定的自願協調標準；如能證明滿足法定安全要求，也可採用替代路徑。中國GB 31241認證本身不能滿足歐盟合格評定文件要求，因此出口商應針對所選擇路徑準備面向歐盟的證據和測試。

source.publisher: European Commission — Harmonised standards for Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU
